Class StreamingSoundSource

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.audio.impl.BaseSoundSource<StreamingSoundSource>
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.audio.impl.StreamingSoundSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, SoundInstance<StreamingSoundSource>, NonThrowingAutoCloseable
public class StreamingSoundSource extends BaseSoundSource<StreamingSoundSource>
Manages a streaming OpenAL sound source. The buffers should be queued.

Buffers are taken from a SoundBufferProvider instance supplied in constructor. There are ready-to-use implementations, see below reference links; to create your own implementation, refer to SoundBufferProvider's Javadoc.

See Also:
  • SoundBufferProvider
  • IterableSoundBufferProvider
  • SamplesSoundBufferProvider

  • Constructor Details

    • StreamingSoundSource

      public StreamingSoundSource(long alcContext, SoundBufferProvider provider, int enqueueStart)
      Creates a new SoundSource with the given sound buffers enqueued.
      Parameters:
      provider - the provider to use for getting buffers
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the given buffer array is null

  • Method Details

    • close

      public void close()
      Destroys this sound source, i.e. releases all associated resources. The sound source can not be used after calling this method. Calling this method more than once does not have any effect.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface NonThrowingAutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in class BaseSoundSource<StreamingSoundSource>

    • rewind

      public void rewind()
      If the state of this source is already initial, does nothing. If the state is playing or paused, firstly stops this source, then sets the state to initial. If the state is stopped, just sets the state to initial.
      Specified by:
      rewind in interface SoundInstance<StreamingSoundSource>
      Overrides:
      rewind in class BaseSoundSource<StreamingSoundSource>

    • tick

      public void tick()
      Ticks this source. This method is executed repeatedly for each playing sound source in the audio engine loop.
      Overrides:
      tick in class BaseSoundSource<StreamingSoundSource>

    • self

      protected StreamingSoundSource self()
      This method must return this sound source.
      Specified by:
      self in class BaseSoundSource<StreamingSoundSource>
      Returns:
      this sound source
